patterns.provider_trait: All providers implement async_trait Provider with fn name() -> &str, fn detect() -> bool (sync, no network), async fn fetch() -> Result<ProviderSnapshot>
patterns.error_handling: On transient failures, return a ProviderSnapshot with error field set, never propagate. Every error path returns Ok(ProviderSnapshot{..., error: Some(...)}).
patterns.registration: New providers added to all_providers() in mod.rs as Box::new(Foo::new()), with pub mod foo; declaration
patterns.credentials_pattern: Each provider checks local files or env vars in detect(). File paths via dirs::home_dir(). Binary existence via which command.
patterns.http_client: reqwest 0.12 with json + rustls-tls. Client::new() used directly in fetch(). No shared client pool.
patterns.test_pattern: Each provider has a parse function (e.g. parse_usage_response) separated from fetch() for unit testing without network. Tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests at bottom of file.
patterns.table_rendering: pct_bar(pct, width) shows colored bar for Some(pct), dim dash for None. print_providers_table renders header + rows. Reset shown as relative duration.
patterns.snapshot_source: Source field: 'oauth', 'rpc', 'pty', 'http', 'log', 'error'. Ollama and OpenCode will use 'http'.

existing_implementations.description: Three providers already exist: Claude (OAuth), Codex (OAuth+RPC+PTY fallback), Gemini (OAuth+PTY). All follow the same Provider trait. The Provider trait detect() is sync — Ollama/OpenCode will use std::net::TcpStream::connect_timeout for port checks.

design_decisions.ollama_two_providers: OllamaLocalProvider (port 11434 detect) and OllamaCloudProvider (env var / config file detect) are separate Provider impls in one file, since they have different detect() and auth logic
design_decisions.detect_sync_port_check: Since detect() is sync, use std::net::TcpStream::connect_timeout(addr, Duration::from_millis(500)) for Ollama local and OpenCode — lightweight, no HTTP overhead, sync-compatible
design_decisions.loaded_models_field: Add loaded_models: Option<Vec<String>> to ProviderSnapshot for Ollama's custom JSON output. serde skip_serializing_if = Option::is_none keeps it invisible for other providers.
design_decisions.table_display_update: When primary_pct is None and loaded_models is set, display model names in the row after the dash columns. Otherwise keep existing display.
design_decisions.sse_deferred: OpenCode SSE subscription (--watch enhancement) is documented in spec as additive. Implement REST fetch first; SSE can be a follow-up since it may need an SSE parsing crate or manual chunked parsing.
design_decisions.no_new_deps: reqwest 0.12, async-trait, tokio, chrono, serde, dirs are all already in Cargo.toml. No new dependencies needed.
